transcript.text:
(Tzuyang's diary)
(Weather: Snow, Day: Saturday) I came here to eat pork cutlets
(I merely ordered pork cutlets...) One of everything, except the regular course
(All the adults looked at me funny...) You're so skinny, how can you eat all that?
(They said they'd scold me if I left any) See if you make any leftovers
(But I really love pork cutlets) Wow, looks good!
(So I wasn't worried about scolding, heehee)
(They said not to be picky about veggies) You should eat your veggies
(So I ate all the veggies)
(I drank 5 Yakult drinks)
(They were amazed and asked if I wasn't full) Let me see your tummy, is nothing wrong?
(Why do all adults get shocked when I eat...?) That pretty lady ate so much
(The wind carried a bit of snow...)
('Food Culture Street' at Gwangmyeong Crossroad)
(The restaurant right at the start of the street)
Hello, everyone

Today, I'm here in Gwangmyeong
(Today is pork cutlet mukbang!) I came here to eat pork cutlets
It's a famous place in Gwangmyeong
They make their own sauce
(Everything's handmade in 'Ottogi Pork Cultet!') They prep their meat themselves as well
They have been in business for 40 years!
(Hurry up) I'll go and eat right now
Best taste! Best service! 'Ottogi Pork Cutlet!'
('Ottogi Pork Cutlet,' Gwangmyeong-si Gyeonggi-do)
(So delicious)
Hello!
(Scanning the menu!) It smells delicious, the menu is there!
('Ottogi Pork Cutlets' menu) King-size pork cutlet, pork cutlet, fish cutlet
Five dishes in total, hmm....?
Six, including the one in the front!
Why?

(Hello) Ottogi regular course
(Ottogi regular course has pork cutlet, fish cutlet, and Hamburg steak) The regular course is the combined dish
I'll eat one of every individual dish!
Ma'am
One of everything, except the regular course!
(King-size pork cutlet + Pork cutlet + Fish cutlet + Pork & fish + Pork Hamburg) Except the regular course?
You can't eat all of that!!
I can eat all of them...!!
You're filming mukbang?
Do you want smaller sizes?
(Never that!!) No, make it the same size
See if you make any leftovers
Hahaha, don't worry, hahahahaha
Do you want the dressing on veggies?
I can't eat ketchup...
(Then just the mayo! Hehe) Only the white sauce

Oh! I'll have just one soup
That's actually good for us
Thank you
I need to pepper it!
(Soup needs pepper...!) This is amazing
Tastes like nutty beans
(Eat your soup slowly!)
(I'll be making cutlets!)
(Handmade pork cutlets, over 40 years of experience...!)
(This is the proper 'Korean-style pork cutlet!'
(A lot of sauce on the fish cutlet!)
(5 in total! 'Ottogi Pork Cutlets' are done!
Where do I put this? You need a bigger table
(Tettris with plates, START...!) King-size pork cutlet!
Three in the front
- Like that? - Yes

Then push the plates
(Succeeded in Tetris!) OK
- Looks pretty, right? - Pretty, hehe
- Thank you - Put this Yakult, probiotic beverage
(Finish!) Right here!
(She's a Tetris master... Lololol)
('Ottogi Pork Cutlets' are here!) Looks delicious!
Pork cutlet
King-size pork cutlet
Pork Hamburg steak
Pork & fish cutlet
Fish cutlet
(I like this so much)
I'll do the regular one first, I've dying to eat this!
(Korean-style pork cutlet has heapings of sauce...!) The orange sauce is really tasty
(I'll eat well!) Let's dig in

Slice into big pieces
(The side looks so tasty...!) Looks delicious
(Brings her back to school days...!) It's just how I liked it as a kid
I know this taste
(I'm watching you... huh?) Let's see how well you eat
The meat is tangly and soft
But thick compared to pork cutlets from other restaurants
The sauce is sweet and sour
It's just like a tasty Korean-style sauce
There would be no disagreements
The sauce is good
The Korean-style pork cutlet is not that crunchy
Because it gets kinda soft and tasty with the sauce
(Soft and crunchy at the same time...!) There's sauce only on one side
So that side's crunchy
The side is very crunchy too

(Down to the last grain of rice!)
(Huh...? Where did the pork cutlet go...?)
Doesn't she get sick...?
(Call me if you need me...!!) Do you want digestive pills? Hoho
The next
Fish cutlet!
It's been a while
(Back in the day... hehe) I used to get these for school lunches
Tartare sauce was a bit sour
This one is very crunchy
The fish melts in my mouth
(Fish cutlet sauce!) Cream sauce with sourness added?
I'll just grab this one
(Crunchy crunch)
(Hm...? She's eating vegetables...?)
(Spills half of it...)

(I can eat veggies now...)
(Fish cutlet CLEAR!)
Next, Pork Hamburg!
How would this Hamburg steak taste like?
How do I say this?
It's less like a Hamburg steak...
More like... Jeon, Korean pancakes???
Peculiar
Meatballs?
(Just for kids) Kids would love this taste
I've never tasted this kind of Hamburg steak
(Eat Hamburg steak with rice!) Scoop rice like this
(Half your face...?) It's too big!
(There was no need to worry... Ha)
(Immediately CUT the pork cutlet!)
I should slice some

(Pork cutlet properly sauced up...) It's all soggy with the sauce
(That's the charm of this pork cutlet) The Korean-style pork cutlet tastes better that way
It's still crunchy!
(Hm...? Scraping veggies by the plate...?!)
(A rare sight, veggies CLEAR...!)
I feel like a goat, huh?
(GET the Yakult drink!)
With one sip of Yakult?
(Drink it all in one sip...!!)
(Very satisfied) It's so good!
(Oh my goodness...)
I'm truly
eating more veggies
more than before, right?
(An improvement, compared to before...) I used to not eat them at all
But now I can eat cabbages

(Showing off) Cabbages are nothing
(Bring forth the King-size pork cutlet!)
(It isn't king-sized for nothing!) This is very much Kingly
(King-sized speed up!)
(Pork cutlet half as big as the face...) Even the half is so big
(Refreshing coke after eating!)
Come in
Now the customers are arriving
(People coming in the early evening!) It's only 4
I do miss something
(She loves clear soup... Hehe) Some clear soup would've been good
It would be better wit h clear soup
(Veggies gone in an instant)
(Cutlets gone in an instant...)
(Last, Pork & fish!) The last one
When I was young, I used to eat

oven cheese spaghetti with Korean-style pork cutlet
I also liked 'Seasoned Potatoes' from 'Lotteria,' the burger chain
(Peacefully enjoying pork & fish...)
I was gonna get a new camera...
(Let me rest...) I think it wants to die! 'Let me die' Lolol
(Camera is on strike) It wants to go, it doesn't want to see the replacement
(Hang on a little more...)
(Just rest now, lol)
(You've been... A good camera...! Hehe) So funny
By the way
I want to drink Yakult again, heh
Isn't it one drink...
Per one plate...?
Could you give me more Yakult...?
(You want some Yakult now?) Do you want them all?
Thank you

(Ehew) Oh, my goodness
(Tzuyang 27-year old kid, hehe)
Let me see your tummy, is nothing wrong?
(Bright smiles)
I got one more as a bonus!
Drinking from the bottom makes it tastier!
You drink it from the bottom
when it's frozen!
(Timid)...Really?
(But you're still drinking it from the bottom... Hehe)
Why did I eat like this when I was young? Why? Heh
(Brighter) It tastes better because you get little sips, heh
Well, this is uncomfortable, huh
(Ripping apart the bottle...)
(Sink hole appears) Oh good
(Just drinking it from the top would've been easier...)

(Spppiiill)
I shouldn't have opened it from the bottom!!
(Being angry for no reason... Lolol) What is this!?
Yakult tastes better with pork cutlets
You can't eat 20 Yakults at once
(Full of questions...) A normal person can't eat 20 Yakults?
(What)
I think I can?
How many milliliters is that?
65 times 20
(Four 280ml ones...) You can't eat 1000ml of Yakult
Why not?
(A sudden controversy over Yakult...)
Can you eat it?
(Of course) More than enough!
(1,300ml of Yakult, to be continued...!) It'll be your next video

(1,300ml of Yakult, to be continued...!) How many bottles of Yakult?
(Most veggies eaten ever) I'm eating maximum cabbages today
You want another Coke? Might be greasy
I'm drinking Yakult!
Another Yakult bottle?
(After finishing these, please...!) I'll ask if I need it, thank you so much
I mean, I rubbed her tummy
(Thumbs up) Great, she's not fat but thin
(One of greatest mysteries...) Where did it all go?
(I really ate everything so cleanly...!)
(Five 'Ottogi Pork Cutlets' ALL CEAR!)
(Well done) You deserve an applause
- I had a great meal - You did?
Aren't you full?
It's enough!
(Wants to ask a lot of questions... Heh)

I mean, your belly looks so small...!!
Ha
Where does it all go?
Can't possibly be human
Incredible
Get popular and go up in Youtube
Thank you so much, hehehe
(Photo time)
Oh? Hello!
(Her favorite drink...?!) I ate here and saw you
You just ate here...?
(The customer who just ate!) I had a good meal
Tzuyang always drinks
plum juice when she's eating, heh
Oh my
That's touching, hahaha

I'm touched
I'll drink it, thank you!
Do you want a plate of pork cutlets?
(It's alright...!) No
(She was very deeply touched...!) I'm impressed, hehehe
(Signing autograph / Getting touched) That's such a kind thing
(Eating a lot was touching to her too...) Young lady eating so much
(Tsunami of tears...!!) I'm touched
(Oh, you pretty things...)
- I ate well today! - Thank you
Do I look good in the video?
